targets.rawSql:
SELECT ifNull(nullIf(gpu_model_name, ''), 'unknown') AS gpu_model_display,
       countDistinct(gpu_id) AS gpu_count
FROM naap.api_current_gpu_inventory
WHERE ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
  AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), model_id))
  AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), orch_address))
GROUP BY gpu_model_display
ORDER BY gpu_count DESC

WITH labels AS (
    SELECT orch_address AS addr, orch_label FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity
)
SELECT g.last_seen AS "Latest Observation",
       g.canonical_pipeline AS "Pipeline",
       ifNull(labels.orch_label, concat(left(g.orch_address, 8), '...', right(g.orch_address, 4))) AS "Orchestrator",
       g.orch_address AS "Orchestrator Address",
       g.model_id AS "Model",
       g.gpu_id AS "GPU ID",
       ifNull(g.gpu_model_name, '') AS "GPU Type",
       round(toFloat64(g.gpu_memory_bytes_total) / 1073741824.0, 1) AS "GPU Memory (GB)"
FROM naap.api_current_gpu_inventory g
LEFT JOIN labels ON labels.addr = g.orch_address
WHERE ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), g.org))
  AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), g.model_id))
  AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), g.orch_address))
ORDER BY "Latest Observation" DESC
LIMIT 50

WITH labels AS (
    SELECT orch_address AS addr, orch_label
    FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity
),
current_inventory AS (
    SELECT orch_address,
        gpu_id,
        argMax(ifNull(gpu_model_name, 'unknown'), last_seen) AS gpu_model_name
    FROM naap.api_observed_capability_offer
    WHERE last_seen >= now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
      AND hardware_present = 1
      AND gpu_id != ''
      AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
      AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), model_id))
      AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), orch_address))
    GROUP BY orch_address, gpu_id
),
prior_inventory AS (
    SELECT orch_address,
        gpu_id,
        argMax(ifNull(gpu_model_name, 'unknown'), last_seen) AS gpu_model_name
    FROM naap.api_observed_capability_offer
    WHERE last_seen >= now() - INTERVAL 14 DAY
      AND last_seen < now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
      AND hardware_present = 1
      AND gpu_id != ''
      AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
      AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), model_id))
      AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), orch_address))
    GROUP BY orch_address, gpu_id
),
current_window AS (
    SELECT orch_address, groupUniqArray(gpu_id) AS current_gpu_ids
    FROM current_inventory
    GROUP BY orch_address
),
prior_window AS (
    SELECT orch_address, groupUniqArray(gpu_id) AS prior_gpu_ids
    FROM prior_inventory
    GROUP BY orch_address
),
diffs AS (
    SELECT coalesce(c.orch_address, p.orch_address) AS orch_address,
        arrayFilter(x -> NOT has(ifNull(p.prior_gpu_ids, CAST([], 'Array(String)')), x), ifNull(c.current_gpu_ids, CAST([], 'Array(String)'))) AS added_gpu_ids,
        arrayFilter(x -> NOT has(ifNull(c.current_gpu_ids, CAST([], 'Array(String)')), x), ifNull(p.prior_gpu_ids, CAST([], 'Array(String)'))) AS removed_gpu_ids
    FROM current_window c
    FULL OUTER JOIN prior_window p
        ON c.orch_address = p.orch_address
),
added_models AS (
    SELECT orch_address,
        arraySort(groupUniqArray(concat(gpu_model_name, ' (', left(matched_gpu_id, 8), '...', right(matched_gpu_id, 4), ')'))) AS added_gpu_models
    FROM (
        SELECT d.orch_address, ci.gpu_id AS matched_gpu_id, ci.gpu_model_name
        FROM diffs d
        ARRAY JOIN d.added_gpu_ids AS gpu_id
        INNER JOIN current_inventory ci
            ON ci.orch_address = d.orch_address
           AND ci.gpu_id = gpu_id
    )
    GROUP BY orch_address
),
removed_models AS (
    SELECT orch_address,
        arraySort(groupUniqArray(concat(gpu_model_name, ' (', left(matched_gpu_id, 8), '...', right(matched_gpu_id, 4), ')'))) AS removed_gpu_models
    FROM (
        SELECT d.orch_address, pi.gpu_id AS matched_gpu_id, pi.gpu_model_name
        FROM diffs d
        ARRAY JOIN d.removed_gpu_ids AS gpu_id
        INNER JOIN prior_inventory pi
            ON pi.orch_address = d.orch_address
           AND pi.gpu_id = gpu_id
    )
    GROUP BY orch_address
),
row_data AS (
    SELECT ifNull(labels.orch_label, concat(left(d.orch_address, 8), '...', right(d.orch_address, 4))) AS orchestrator,
        d.orch_address AS orchestrator_address,
        length(d.added_gpu_ids) AS gpus_added,
        length(d.removed_gpu_ids) AS gpus_removed,
        arrayStringConcat(ifNull(am.added_gpu_models, []), ', ') AS added_gpus,
        arrayStringConcat(ifNull(rm.removed_gpu_models, []), ', ') AS removed_gpus,
        1 AS sort_group
    FROM diffs d
    LEFT JOIN labels ON labels.addr = d.orch_address
    LEFT JOIN added_models am ON am.orch_address = d.orch_address
    LEFT JOIN removed_models rm ON rm.orch_address = d.orch_address
    WHERE d.orch_address != ''
      AND (length(d.added_gpu_ids) > 0 OR length(d.removed_gpu_ids) > 0)
),
total_row AS (
    SELECT 'TOTAL' AS orchestrator,
        '' AS orchestrator_address,
        sum(gpus_added) AS gpus_added,
        sum(gpus_removed) AS gpus_removed,
        '' AS added_gpus,
        '' AS removed_gpus,
        0 AS sort_group
    FROM row_data
)
SELECT orchestrator AS "Orchestrator",
    orchestrator_address AS "Orchestrator Address",
    gpus_added AS "GPUs Added",
    gpus_removed AS "GPUs Removed",
    added_gpus AS "Added GPUs",
    removed_gpus AS "Removed GPUs"
FROM (
    SELECT * FROM total_row
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM row_data
)
ORDER BY sort_group ASC, "GPUs Added" DESC, "GPUs Removed" DESC, "Orchestrator" ASC
LIMIT 51

panels.title: Orchestrator GPU Changes (7d vs prior 7d)
panels.description: Compares orchestrator GPU inventory seen in the latest 7 days versus the prior 7 days. GPU IDs can fluctuate on virtualized or re-enumerated systems, so a UUID change may appear as one GPU removed and a new GPU added even when the underlying hardware did not change.

targets.rawSql:
WITH current_window AS (
    SELECT sum(job_count) AS current_value
    FROM naap.api_hourly_request_demand
    WHERE window_start >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
      AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
      AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(canonical_model, '')))
      AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), orchestrator_address))
), baseline_window AS (
    SELECT sum(job_count) AS baseline_value
    FROM naap.api_hourly_request_demand
    WHERE window_start >= now() - INTERVAL 8 DAY
      AND window_start < now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
      AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
      AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(canonical_model, '')))
      AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), orchestrator_address))
)
SELECT if(
    ifNull(baseline_value, 0) = 0,
    0.0,
    (toFloat64(ifNull(current_value, 0)) - toFloat64(baseline_value)) / toFloat64(baseline_value)
) AS value
FROM current_window
CROSS JOIN baseline_window

panels.title: Demand Change (7d)
panels.description: Percent change in total network request demand for the latest 24 hours versus the same 24-hour window seven days earlier.

targets.rawSql:
WITH current_window AS (
    SELECT uniqExact(gpu_id) AS current_value
    FROM naap.api_observed_capability_offer
    WHERE last_seen >= now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
      AND hardware_present = 1
      AND gpu_id != ''
      AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
      AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), model_id))
      AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), orch_address))
), baseline_window AS (
    SELECT uniqExact(gpu_id) AS baseline_value
    FROM naap.api_observed_capability_offer
    WHERE last_seen >= now() - INTERVAL 14 DAY
      AND last_seen < now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
      AND hardware_present = 1
      AND gpu_id != ''
      AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
      AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), model_id))
      AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), orch_address))
)
SELECT if(
    ifNull(baseline_value, 0) = 0,
    0.0,
    (toFloat64(ifNull(current_value, 0)) - toFloat64(baseline_value)) / toFloat64(baseline_value)
) AS value
FROM current_window
CROSS JOIN baseline_window

panels.title: Supply Change (7d)
panels.description: Percent change in unique GPUs seen across the latest 7 days versus the prior 7-day window. This is a network-level unique-GPU comparison, so it will not necessarily equal the per-orchestrator add/remove totals when GPUs move between orchestrators or GPU UUIDs are reissued.

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT org FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity WHERE org != '' ORDER BY org
list.label: Org
list.name: org

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT model_id FROM naap.api_observed_capability_offer WHERE model_id != '' AND hardware_present = 1 AND last_seen >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), orch_address)) ORDER BY model_id
list.label: Model
list.name: model

list.definition: SELECT orch_address AS __value, orch_label AS __text FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity WHERE ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) ORDER BY __text
list.label: Orchestrator (ENS)
list.name: orchestrator
list.query: SELECT concat(coalesce(nullIf(orch_label, ''), orch_address), ':',  orch_address) FROM naap.api_variable_orchestrators

title: NaaP: Supply & Inventory
description: Supply dashboard showing network state over the last 24 hours. Inventory panels are windowed views of GPUs and pricing seen in 24h, not authoritative current network state.
